message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Utilisateur" as User
rectangle "Esidom front-end" as FrontEnd
rectangle "Esidom back-end" as BackEnd
rectangle "Home Assistant" as HomeAssistant

User -> FrontEnd : Lister les routines
FrontEnd -> BackEnd : GET /automations
BackEnd -> HomeAssistant : WS: {type: "get_states"}
HomeAssistant --> BackEnd : WS: {type: "result", success: true, result: []}
BackEnd --> FrontEnd : 200 - Ok
FrontEnd --> User : Les routines sont listées

@enduml
```
